funFacts: The Saber-toothed Tiger on Rocky Outlook is a solitary hunter and excellent swimmer, often bathing in rivers to stay cool in the heat.
Saber-toothed Tiger on Rocky Outlooks are the largest wild cats in the world, instantly recognized by their orange coats and unique black stripes.
